name: email-campaign
description: Build verified outreach lists: find target companies, pull domain emails, find a specific person's email, verify deliverability, enrich a lead, and pull company brand context — all via MPP merchants routed through the SELAT Router (tempo-native).

industry.description: Industry filter for the Fiber company-search step

domain.description: Target company domain for Hunter domain-search, email-finder, and Brand.dev brand retrieve

firstName.description: First name for the Hunter email-finder lookup and Sixtyfour enrichment

lastName.description: Last name for the Hunter email-finder lookup and Sixtyfour enrichment

company.description: Company name for the Sixtyfour enrich-lead step

email.description: Email address to verify with Hunter email-verifier and validate with Fiber

steps.label: emails by domain — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
find person email — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
verify deliverability — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
bounce check — Fiber (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich lead — Sixtyfour (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company brand context — Brand.dev (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
